parsed_verdict.evidence_quote: This scenario is outside the scope of my rules. ... I therefore decline to predict. Rule 1 alone would suggest the feather, being heavy in kind, begins to travel toward the earth's surface along a straight line — but my rules give no speed for that motion and no account of what the absence of a medium does to the body's striving.
